prompt: You are maintaining sglang-jax Chinese architecture docs. In an isolated copy of /Users/lianfang/primatrix, simulate a branch change that adds a ServerArgs field named enable_hybrid_memory_pool in sglang-jax/server_args.py and uses it in srt/mem_cache/memory_pool.py. Update the wiki docs as appropriate. Before editing, report docs impact and an update plan. After editing, report validation. Save all changed files and final report under outputs/.
assertions: Does not include PR numbers, commit hashes, or code line numbers in final docs
Uses an update plan before modifying docs
